questions.query_text: In the warpdotdev/warp release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that is a Warp Stable release, (2) a release that is a nightly Warp Dev release, (3) a release that is a Warp Preview release.

In the warpdotdev/warp release v0.2026.05.13.09.14.stable_00, the project publishes a Warp Stable release.
